programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Woman in White

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Nazi on the Honeymoon

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Dude in the Dam

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Fury in the Jury

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Mystery in the Meat

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Spark in the Park

programme.title: Bones
programme.sub-title: The Ghost in the Killer
programme.desc: The team investigates when the remains of a girl who died 18 years earlier are delivered to Brennan and Booth's house; Brennan dreams about Pelant.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Musician Heal Thyself
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a petty officer whom Pride had mentored; Brody searches for a place to call home.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Carrier
programme.desc: When a Navy lieutenant on liberty dies of bubonic plague, NCIS Special Agent Tony DiNozzo helps the New Orleans team as they try to control a potential outbreak and find the source of the infectious disease.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Breaking Brig

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The Recruits

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: It Happened Last Night

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Master of Horror

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Watch Over Me
programme.desc: The team investigate the murder of a Navy Officer assigned as a tech liaison with a private developer; Pride turns the carport into an auto shop.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Love Hurts

programme.sub-title: Nalowale

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ko'olauloa

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ho'apono
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL accused of murder takes hostages and safe haven on a memorial battleship.

programme.sub-title: Mana'o

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Po'ipu
programme.desc: The team must protect a ruthless dictator from an assassination.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Risky Business

programme.sub-title: Rogue Element

programme.sub-title: Talismans
programme.desc: The team must recover stealth technology from a military plane that was shot down in Bosnia; Walter's sister visits with Sylvester at the garage.

programme.title: Scorpion

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Acceptable Loss

programme.sub-title: Open Water

programme.sub-title: Shock

programme.desc: Still reeling from the murder of one of their own, Steve and Catherine, along with Danny, Junior and some old friends, hunt down the killer; a bag of human bones discovered inside an abandoned storage locker goes missing.
